title: CraftMobs
description: Craft the mob spawn eggs in Survival!
body:
Craft the Mobs

This mod allows you to craft the mob spawn eggs using a totem of undying and items related to the mob such as their drops.

This eases the process of finding rarer mobs late-game or getting mobs to specific locations.

Supports all versions from 1.18 to 1.20.4.

Use JEI to see recipes.

:)

This mod can run server-side only, or both sides.
